E_PTDFFS_1 - 12 Monthly Medicare Part D fee-for-service (FFS) indicator. January through December. 1 - Stand-alone Prescription Drug Plan (PDP)
2 - Employer-direct plan
3- Medicare Advantage - Prescription Drug Plan (MA-PD)
4 - Other
Null - No Medicare Part D coverage
